articles.title: U.S. shares higher at close of trade; Dow Jones Industrial Average up 0.19%
articles.summary: U.S. equities closed higher on Monday, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average rising 0.19%, the S&P 500 climbing 0.19%, and the NASDAQ Composite adding 0.10%. Gains were primarily driven by the Oil & Gas, Basic Materials, and Industrials sectors. Caterpillar, Honeywell International, and Cisco Systems were among the top performers on the Dow, while Nike, Walt Disney Company, and International Business Machines saw declines.
